evals.prompt: I just changed the agent loop in packages/coding-agent/src/core/agent-session.ts. Verify it still completes a turn without spending tokens, and show me evidence.
evals.expected_output: Uses the senpi-qa skill, runs the mock-loop channel (and/or rpc-drive), captures evidence under local-ignore/qa-evidence/, reports pass/fail.

evals.prompt: I added a new keybinding to the TUI. Smoke test that the interactive TUI still boots and accepts input.
evals.expected_output: Uses senpi-qa Channel 2 (tui-smoke.mjs) and confirms boot/render/input with the real auth file untouched.

evals.prompt: qa senpi rpc mode and prove get_state works headlessly.
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/rpc-drive.mjs --self-test (or --state) and reports the RpcSessionState round-trip with no API call.

evals.prompt: I wired up a new provider in packages/ai. How do I QA it end to end without burning real tokens?
evals.expected_output: Points to senpi-qa Channel 3 mock loop with the custom-provider models.json shape, and notes env-vars.md / credential-injection.md updates.
